# Rayane Benabdeljalil — Portfolio

> Portfolio of Rayane Benabdeljalil — game developer, community manager and musician. Showcases shipped browser games, Unity/Unreal projects and creative work.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Bio, skills, featured projects and contact.

## Projects

- [HAVOC: The New Reckoning](/project/havoc-the-new-reckoning): Solo-developed browser-based multiplayer RPG.
- [Vampire Survivors](/project/voidrift-survivors): Unity roguelike with object pooling and dynamic power-ups.
- [The Line](/project/the-line): Unity WebGL precision/timing arcade game.
- [Flappy Bird](/project/flappy-bird): Unity WebGL recreation of the classic Flappy Bird.
- [Vault of Shadows](/project/vault-of-shadows): Unity dungeon crawler with encrypted saves and leaderboards.
- [The Iron Curtain](/project/the-iron-curtain): Unreal Engine 4-player co-op survival horror.
- [MangaDemon](/project/mangademon): Manga scanlation community and the Veyra web RPG.
